programme.desc: One Piece - T03E25

programme.title: 2003. Usopp e Sanji tentam retomar o controle do Corvo, e Luffy combate os obstáculos das Nuvens Surpresa enquanto combate Satori! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: A Provação da Bola! Combate Desesperado na Floresta Perdida!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E26

programme.title: 2003. Chopper luta bravamente para deter Shura, que quer incinerar o Going Merry, mas a pequena rena não é páreo para o Sacerdote. Gan Fall está a caminho, mas chegará a tempo para ajudar? Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Chopper em Perigo! O Deus de Outrora vs. o Sacerdote Shura!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E27

programme.title: 2003. Gan Fall sofre queimaduras graves em sua batalha com Shura, e Chopper precisa de coragem para seguir em frente. Enquanto isso, Luffy parece ter descoberto como vencer Satori! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Profundo Mistério! Provação das Cordas e Provação do Amor?
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E28

programme.title: 2003. O povo de Shandora se prepara para um ataque contra seus adversários, e Chopper conhece as misteriosas criaturas que salvaram sua vida. Já Nami faz incríveis descobertas sobre a origem do Jardim de Cima! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Acenda-se o Fogo de Shandora! Wyper, o Guerreiro!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E29

programme.title: 2003. O povo de Shandora continua sua batalha pelo controle do Jardim de Cima, e os Chapéus de Palha celebram seu reencontro! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Jaya, a Cidade de Ouro do Céu! Rumo ao Santuário de Deus!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E30

programme.title: 2003. A busca de Laki por um Vearth faz com que um de seus camaradas Shandias acabe ferido por Ohm. A noite chega no Jardim de Cima, e os Chapéus de Palha sonham com ouro enquanto dançam com lobos! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Festival na Véspera da Caçada ao Tesouro! Sentimentos pelo Vearth!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E31

programme.title: 2003. A eletrizante deidade de Skypiea, o Deus Enel, dá a seus sacerdotes poderes ilimitados em sua caçada pelos Chapéus de Palha. Usopp tem um plano para recuperar o Merry, mas precisará de Chopper como cobaia! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: O Deus Enel! Adeus aos Sobreviventes!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E32

programme.title: 2003. Os Chapéus de Palha se separam para buscar o ouro, e Wyper está decidido a fazer a investida final ao Santuário de Deus de Enel! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Uma Serpente Gigante Mostra Suas Presas!O Jogo de Sobrevivência Começa!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E33

programme.title: 2003. O Deus tirano de Skypiea antecipa seu ataque quando as forças de Shandora são confrontadas pela Provação das Cordas, e Luffy se envolve na batalha de sua vida! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: A Rejeição Mortal! A Determinação do Demônio da Guerra, Wyper!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E34

programme.title: 2003. Zoro confrontra o guerreiro Shandia Braham para aperfeiçoar uma nova técnica de suas espadas em pleno ar. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: Batalha em Pleno Ar! O Pirata Zoro vs o Guerreiro Braham!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E35

programme.title: 2003. Sanji e Usopp caem diante de Deus, Luffy é praticamente incinerado pela Bazuca de Wyper, e Nami e Gan Fall combatem dois clones assassinos! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: O Rugido da Bazuca Incineradora! Luffy vs Demônio da Guerra Wyper!
programme.desc: One Piece - T03E36

programme.title: 2003. Chopper libera a fúria de sua Goma do Barulho durante um pegajoso combate com o sacerdote pantanoso do Jardim de Cima! A rena descobrirá a fraqueza do inimigo antes que seja tarde demais? Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu
programme.sub-title: A Provação do Pântano! Chopper vs o Valentão do Céu, Gedatsu!

programme.desc: Beyblade G-Revolution - T03E19

programme.title: 2003. A etapa egípcia do Campeonato do Mundo culmina com a partida final, destacando a Dinastia F contra a Revolução BBA. Um dia antes da partida, Tyson fez Daichi praticar movimentos com ele que eles normalmente não estão acostumados a fazer. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Mitsuo Hashimoto
programme.desc: Beyblade G-Revolution - T03E20

programme.title: 2003. Tyson está sentindo a pressão de ser campeão do mundo. Apesar do aviso de Hiro, uma equipe de televisão o segue por um dia, gravando todos os seus movimentos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Mitsuo Hashimoto
programme.desc: Beyblade G-Revolution - T03E21

programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E23

programme.title: 2001. Sesshomaru visita o youkai da árvore Bokusen-Oh buscando os segredos da transformação de Inuyasha. Enquanto isso, Sango se preocupa com um Kohaku inconsciente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E24

programme.title: 2001. Inuyasha se transforma em um youkai quando sua vida corre perigo. Ele rapidamente acaba com Gatenmaru, que se transformou. Ele ataca os bandidos que estão escapando com suas garras, e ele não pode ouvir Agome tentando pará-lo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Verdadeira Natureza do Youkai Não Pode ser Reprimida
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E25

programme.title: 2001. Inuyasha visita Totosai com a Tessaiga quebrada. Sua própria presa é usada para consertá-la. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Inimigo Mortal de Meu Pai: Ryukusei
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E26

programme.title: 2001. Ryukotsusei tira a Tessaiga de Inuyasha e ele se transforma em um youkai. Totosai diz a todos para recuar porque estão em perigo, mas Agome decide ficar para trás. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Onda Explosiva! O Ataque Supremo da Tessaiga
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E27

programme.title: 2001. Em uma certa aldeia, Shippo conhece uma garota chamada Satsuki. Satsuki acredita que seu irmão, que foi à guerra, voltará. Ela mostra a Shippo o tesouro que seu irmão lhe deu, um fragmento de Jóia. Infelizmente, é apenas uma flor feita de pedra. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Flor de Pedra e o Primeiro Amor de Shippo
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T03E01

programme.desc: When Chris Vaughn returns to his hometown to find work, he finds that the lumber mill has closed and the town's big business is now a casino. Aided by his friend Ray Templeton, Vaughn tries to make a stand against the area's crime and corruption.

programme.title: Sahara (2005)
programme.desc: A treasure hunter (Matthew McConaughey) and his sidekick (Steve Zahn) join forces with a doctor (Penélope Cruz) to search for a Confederate ship in Africa.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandora's box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Elizabethtown (2005)
programme.desc: In Kentucky to bury his father, a troubled man (Orlando Bloom) gets his life on track with the help of a free-spirited flight attendant (Kirsten Dunst).

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: The mayor opposes a single mother (Juliette Binoche) who is opening a chocolate shop in his 1950s French village across from a church during Lent.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Much Ado About Nothing (1993)
programme.desc: Shakespeare's Don Pedro (Denzel Washington) pairs Benedick (Kenneth Branagh) and Beatrice (Emma Thompson) and woos Hero for Claudio around a lively Italian villa.

programme.title: Serendipity (2001)
programme.desc: A man (John Cusack) and a woman (Kate Beckinsale) try to find each other after spending one night together 10 years earlier.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny (1991)
programme.desc: An ex-convict short-order cook (Al Pacino) chases a Manhattan waitress (Michelle Pfeiffer) who plays hard to get.

programme.title: Lady Chatterley's Lover (1981)
programme.desc: D.H. Lawrence's novel inspired this story of the wife of a paraplegic English aristocrat who takes a lover.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff! (1969)
programme.desc: A stranger (James Garner) tames an Old West boomtown and woos the mayor's daughter (Joan Hackett) on his way to Australia.

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter (1971)
programme.desc: A con man (James Garner) and his partner (Jack Elam) profit from mistaken identity in the mining town of Purgatory.

programme.title: Lady Jane (1986)
programme.desc: Teenage Lady Jane Grey (Helena Bonham Carter) rules England briefly with lusty Lord Dudley (Cary Elwes) in the royal confusion of 1553.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Much Ado About Nothing (1993)
programme.desc: Shakespeare's Don Pedro (Denzel Washington) pairs Benedick (Kenneth Branagh) and Beatrice (Emma Thompson) and woos Hero for Claudio around a lively Italian villa.

programme.title: Serendipity (2001)
programme.desc: A man (John Cusack) and a woman (Kate Beckinsale) try to find each other after spending one night together 10 years earlier.

programme.title: Audrey Rose (1977)
programme.desc: Parents (Marsha Mason, John Beck) of a girl notice odd behavior after a man (Anthony Hopkins) tells them she holds his dead daughter's spirit.

programme.title: The Burning (1981)
programme.desc: A disfigured caretaker with shears returns to the summer camp where campers played a prank on him five years earlier.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: The residents of town stand at a crossroads unlike any they've faced before as Boyd sets a daring, and dangerous, plan in motion.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan (1998)
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Executive Decision (1996)
programme.desc: A commando squad must conduct a midair assault upon a hijacked plane loaded with terrorists and a deadly nerve gas.

programme.title: Gang Related (1997)
programme.desc: Two corrupt homicide cops selling narcotics accidentally kill an undercover DEA agent and try to pin the murder on a homeless alcoholic, but the dead man's partner comes calling.

programme.title: The Greatest Show on Earth (1952)
programme.desc: A high-wire artist, the girlfriend (Betty Hutton) of a circus manager (Charlton Heston), falls for a French aerialist (Cornel Wilde).

programme.title: Dark Angel (1990)
programme.desc: An alien policeman (Dolph Lundgren) and an FBI agent (Brian Benben) hunt an alien hulk which kills for heroin in Houston.

programme.title: Irma La Douce (1963)
programme.desc: A fired French policeman (Jack Lemmon) falls for a Paris streetwalker (Shirley MacLaine) and becomes her protector.

programme.title: She Rides Shotgun (2025)
programme.desc: Marked for death by unrelenting enemies, a newly released ex-con must protect his estranged 11-year-old daughter from a corrupt sheriff and a brutal gang leader who'll stop at nothing to protect his criminal interests.

programme.title: The Wasp (2024)
programme.desc: Two estranged friends unveil a dangerous and deceptive plot that forever changes their lives.

programme.title: Narc (2002)
programme.desc: A policeman (Jason Patric) and a tough veteran (Ray Liotta) try to solve the murder of the latter's undercover partner.

programme.title: To Live and Die in L.A. (1985)
programme.sub-title: To Live and Die in L.A. (1985)
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent (William L. Petersen) bends and breaks the law to nab an artist/counterfeiter (Willem Dafoe) in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Paycheck (2003)
programme.desc: After learning that his memory has been erased, a technical wizard (Ben Affleck) goes on the run to piece together clues from his past.

programme.title: Project Hail Mary (2026)
programme.desc: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory slowly returns, he soon discovers he must solve the riddle behind a mysterious substance that's causing the sun to die out.

programme.title: The Martian (2015)
programme.desc: Left behind by his crew, a stranded astronaut must find a way to survive on Mars, while NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home.

programme.title: In the Land of Saints and Sinners (2023)
programme.sub-title: In the Land of Saints and Sinners (2023)
programme.desc: Hoping to leave his dark past behind him, former assassin Finbar Murphy leads a quiet life in a coastal Irish town. However, when terrorists show up, he must soon choose between exposing his secret identity and defending his friends and neighbors.

programme.title: Barefoot in the Park (1967)
programme.desc: A conservative lawyer (Robert Redford) marries a vivacious woman (Jane Fonda), and the two move into a busy Greenwich Village apartment.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: The residents of town stand at a crossroads unlike any they've faced before as Boyd sets a daring, and dangerous, plan in motion.

programme.title: Children of a Lesser God (1986)
programme.desc: Starting his new job as an instructor at a New England school for the deaf, James Leeds meets Sarah Norman, a young deaf woman who works at the school as a member of the custodial staff.

programme.title: Hour of the Gun (1967)
programme.desc: Wyatt Earp (James Garner) deputizes Doc Holliday (Jason Robards) and forms a posse to hunt Ike Clanton (Robert Ryan) and his gang.

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri (1954)
programme.desc: Recalled to duty, a lawyer (William Holden) leaves his wife (Grace Kelly) and goes to Korea to bomb bridges for an admiral (Fredric March).

programme.title: Cinderfella (1960)
programme.desc: Cinderfella's fairy godfather helps him escape from his wicked stepmother and stepbrothers.

programme.title: The Love Letter (1999)
programme.desc: A bookstore manager (Kate Capshaw) in a small town finds an anonymous love letter and searches for the person who wrote it.

programme.title: The Believers (1987)
programme.desc: A police psychologist (Martin Sheen) and his son (Harley Cross) discover a sacrificial cult in New York.

programme.title: Rings (2017)
programme.desc: A young woman (Matilda Lutz) makes a horrifying discovery after her boyfriend (Alex Roe) investigates a story about a mysterious video that kills people seven days after they watch it.

programme.title: Smile 2 (2024)
programme.desc: Global pop sensation Skye Riley begins to experience increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and pressures of fame, she must face her dark past to regain control of her life.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: The residents of town stand at a crossroads unlike any they've faced before as Boyd sets a daring, and dangerous, plan in motion.

programme.title: The Woman in Black (2012)
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer (Daniel Radcliffe) encounters ghostly goings-on at the foreboding estate of a recently deceased client.

programme.title: The Amityville Horror (1979)
programme.desc: A couple (James Brolin, Margot Kidder) battle a demonic presence in their new home, the location of many gruesome murders a year earlier.

programme.title: The Amityville Horror (2005)
programme.desc: Strange events take place after a family (Ryan Reynolds, Melissa George, Jesse James) moves into a new house that was the site of several gruesome murders.

programme.title: The Dark Half (1993)
programme.desc: A Maine professor's (Timothy Hutton) hidden bad side comes alive under his notorious but successful pen name.

programme.title: El Dorado (1966)
programme.desc: An old gunfighter (John Wayne), a drifter (James Caan) and a deputy sober up a sheriff (Robert Mitchum) to track down killers.

programme.title: Little Big Man (1970)
programme.desc: A 121-year-old white survivor (Dustin Hoffman) of the Battle of the Little Bighorn recalls his checkered life with Cheyenne, Wild Bill Hickok. Medicine shows and more.

programme.title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World (1963)
programme.sub-title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World (1963)
programme.desc: A motley assortment of characters embarks on a chaotic and slapstick-filled race to find $350,000 in buried loot.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back in Business (2004)
programme.desc: The owner of a barbershop faces pressure from a corporation that is opening establishments in his neighborhood.

programme.title: Gung Ho (1986)
programme.desc: American autoworkers have a hard time accepting new work ethics when a Japanese car manufacturer takes over.

programme.title: Suburbicon (2017)
programme.desc: Suburbicon is a peaceful, idyllic, suburban community with affordable homes and manicured lawns. But the tranquil surface masks a disturbing reality, as family man Gardner Lodge navigates the town's dark underbelly of betrayal, deceit and violence.

programme.title: Soapdish (1991)
programme.desc: The star (Sally Field) of a soap opera is rattled by her ex-lover's (Kevin Kline) return to the daytime drama The Sun Also Sets.

programme.title: Cadillac Man (1990)
programme.desc: An angry husband (Tim Robbins) catches up to a wise-guy car salesman (Robin Williams) who cons customers and women.

programme.title: Defiance (2008)
programme.desc: In 1941 three refugee brothers (Daniel Craig, Liev Schreiber, Jamie Bell) turn a daily struggle to survive into a personal battle to save their people from the Nazis.

programme.title: Gasoline Alley (2022)
programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

programme.title: Breach (2020)
programme.desc: Fleeing a devastating plague on Earth, an interstellar ark comes under attack from a new threat -- a shape-shifting alien force intent on slaughtering what's left of humanity.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin' (2005)
programme.desc: When his world spirals out of control, a drug dealer wants to leave his violent life behind and pursue his dream of becoming a rap artist. He channels the same manic intensity to his writing as he does to dealing.

programme.title: The Survivalist (2021)
programme.desc: A year and a half after the fall of civilization due to a viral outbreak, a former FBI agent is forced to protect a young woman immune to the disease from a dangerous gang leader hunting her.

programme.title: The Time Machine (2002)
programme.desc: A scientist (Guy Pearce) travels into the future and meets a race of people who fear hideous monsters living under the ground.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact (1996)
programme.desc: Picard (Patrick Stewart), Riker (Jonathan Frakes) and the others set off to stop the half-robot Borg from sabotaging the first warp drive flight in 2063.

programme.title: Before Dawn (2024)
programme.desc: A young man joins his countrymen on the Western front of World War I, hoping to expedite an end to the bloody conflict. However, as the battle rages on, he's forced to grapple with the brutal realities of trench warfare.

programme.title: The Presidio (1988)
programme.desc: An Army provost marshal (Sean Connery) clashes with a detective (Mark Harmon) over a murder at the San Francisco military base.

programme.title: Barron's Cove (2024)
programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his son's death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, he's left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.title: Outlaw Posse (2024)
programme.desc: In 1908 an outlaw returns from years of hiding in Mexico to claim stolen gold hidden in the hills of Montana.

programme.title: The Warrior (2001)
programme.desc: A swordsman (Irfan Khan) must outrun a despot's henchmen after he renounces violence and heads for the Himalayas.

programme.title: Downhill Racer (1969)
programme.desc: A cocky American skis and après-skis Europe, training with his coach for the Olympics.

programme.title: Cusp (2021)
programme.desc: Filmmakers Parker Hill and Isabel Bethencourt share a fascinating glimpse into authentic American girlhood, where the strictures of adolescence clash with the growing desire for personal agency.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin (2016)
programme.desc: A German couple lose their son in WWII, prompting them to become secretly anti-Nazi.

programme.title: The Kingmaker (2019)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Lauren Greenfield examines the controversial history of Filipino politician Imelda Marcos and her family.

programme.title: The Dead Don't Hurt (2023)
programme.desc: When the man she loves, Holger Olsen, goes off to fight in the Civil War, Vivienne Le Coudy must fend for herself in a place controlled by a corrupt mayor and his unscrupulous business partner.

programme.title: Raging Grace (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Wakefield (2016)
programme.desc: Howard Wakefield, a New York City lawyer, hides out in the attic of his home for weeks. When a former boyfriend re-enters his wife's life, he realizes that he may not be able to return to the life he has abandoned.

programme.title: Camp X-Ray (2014)
programme.desc: A female guard at Guantánamo Bay forms an unlikely friendship with one of the facility's longtime detainees.

programme.title: Daniela Forever (2024)
programme.desc: After his girlfriend dies in an accident, a grieving man joins a sleep trial that allows him to rebuild his life with her through the use of lucid dreams.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renée Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renée Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them.

programme.title: Parallel (2024)
programme.desc: Following the journey of Vanessa, a grief-stricken woman who mysteriously finds herself navigating between parallel spaces.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Raging Grace (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Tabloid (2010)
programme.desc: In the 1970s, former Miss Wyoming Joyce McKinney becomes obsessed with a Mormon acquaintance and flies to England to abduct him after he goes there for missionary work.

programme.title: Rumours (2024)
programme.desc: Leaders of the world's wealthiest democracies become spectacles of incompetence, contending with increasingly surreal obstacles as night falls in the misty woods, and they realize they are suddenly alone.

programme.title: Pretty Red Dress (2022)
programme.desc: The story of Travis, Candice and their daughter, Kenisha, and their relationships with the same red dress.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall (2024)
programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: Wishful Thinking (1996)
programme.desc: A young woman (Drew Barrymore) falls for her best friend (James LeGros) while he looks for the man his girlfriend (Jennifer Beals) is having an affair with.

programme.title: Last Weekend (2014)
programme.desc: Petty squabbling marks the Memorial Day reunion of an affluent matriarch (Patricia Clarkson) and her dysfunctional family (Chris Mulkey, Zachary Booth).

programme.title: Personal Shopper (2016)
programme.desc: A young American in Paris works as a personal shopper for a celebrity. She seems to have the ability to communicate with spirits, like her recently deceased twin brother. Soon, she starts to receive ambiguous messages from an unknown source.

programme.title: The Fan (1981)
programme.desc: Douglas, a record salesman, is an obsessive fan of actress Sally Ross. When his letters are rejected, he strikes out at her and her loved ones.

programme.title: The General's Daughter (1999)
programme.desc: Two investigators (John Travolta, Madeleine Stowe) find an underworld of sex and cover-ups behind an Army captain's murder.

programme.title: The Night Clerk (2020)
programme.desc: A hotel clerk becomes the prime suspect when a woman is murdered during his shift. As the police investigation closes in, he makes a personal connection with a guest -- but soon realizes he must stop the killer before she becomes the next victim.

programme.title: Don't Knock Twice (2016)
programme.desc: A mother looking to reconnect with her estranged daughter attracts the attention of a demonic witch.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Strange Darling (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer's vicious murder spree.

programme.title: Wishful Thinking (1996)
programme.desc: A young woman (Drew Barrymore) falls for her best friend (James LeGros) while he looks for the man his girlfriend (Jennifer Beals) is having an affair with.

programme.title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.sub-title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.desc: Lorine Padilla joins a street gang in the Bronx, N.Y., before becoming an activist and spiritual adviser.

programme.title: Sarafina! (1992)
programme.desc: A South African student (Leleti Khumalo) joins the anti-apartheid revolution in her township of Soweto.

programme.title: The Tribes of Palos Verdes (2017)
programme.desc: When the situation at her idyllic Palos Verdes home turns volatile, young Medina attempts to surf her way to happiness.

programme.title: Nine (2009)
programme.desc: An Italian director (Daniel Day-Lewis) endures personal and creative crises as he tries to juggle relationships with his wife (Marion Cotillard), his mistress (Penélope Cruz) and numerous other women.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Bride and Prejudice (2004)
programme.desc: Mrs Bakshi is looking for suitable husbands for her daughters. When the rich single gents Balraj and Darcy visit, the Bakshis have high hopes, but circumstances get in the way of romance.

programme.title: View From the Top (2003)
programme.desc: A woman (Gwyneth Paltrow) from a small Nevada town makes friends while training to become a flight attendant.

programme.title: Waking Up in Reno (2002)
programme.desc: A married man (Billy Bob Thornton) has an affair with his best friend's wife (Charlize Theron) while both couples travel from Arkansas to Nevada.
